live_gates.label: Phase 0 external-readiness gate
live_gates.summary: seq_020 still reports `withheld` for Phase 0 entry; no real provider mutation may proceed while the external-readiness chain remains withheld.

live_gates.label: NHS login partner approval
live_gates.summary: Real client IDs, redirect registration, and production credentials stay placeholder-only until the NHS login partner onboarding path and named approver identity are complete.

live_gates.label: Redirect and environment review
live_gates.summary: The redirect matrix is generated and route-family bound, but a later human review must approve any real sandpit or live redirect registration.

live_gates.label: Identity and session parity proof
live_gates.summary: This pack binds redirect URIs, VoT profiles, scopes, and callback outcomes to the blueprint’s route-intent and local-session law.

live_gates.label: Environment target present
live_gates.summary: Real runs must specify sandpit, integration, or production as a named target. The pack intentionally leaves the field blank.

live_gates.label: Live mutation flag enabled
live_gates.summary: All generated browser automation defaults to dry-run and refuses live submission until ALLOW_REAL_PROVIDER_MUTATION=true.

live_gates.label: IM1 and SCAL approval
live_gates.summary: Any real `gp_integration_credentials` use remains blocked until IM1, SCAL, and approved third-party pairing evidence are current.

live_gates.label: Technical conformance and regression pack
live_gates.summary: The simulator covers callback, userinfo, stale-code, and redirect rules now, but official technical conformance still belongs to the actual integration environment.

placeholder_fields.label: Named approver
placeholder_fields.notes: Must identify the operator who may later pause-and-confirm a real submission run.

placeholder_fields.label: Environment target
placeholder_fields.notes: Must be one of sandpit, integration, or production.

placeholder_fields.label: Sandpit client ID
placeholder_fields.notes: Capture to quarantine first, then move to metadata registry after review.

placeholder_fields.label: Integration client ID
placeholder_fields.notes: Becomes active only after product demo and environment approval.

placeholder_fields.label: Production client ID
placeholder_fields.notes: Must never be committed to the repository or screenshots.

placeholder_fields.label: Public-key submission ref
placeholder_fields.notes: The private key remains outside the repo; this field records the approved public-key reference only.

placeholder_fields.label: Redirect review ref
placeholder_fields.notes: Must refer to the generated route-family redirect matrix rather than ad hoc form text.

placeholder_fields.label: Scope approval ref
placeholder_fields.notes: Records the approved scope bundle and VTR for later real onboarding.

placeholder_fields.label: Provider test pack reference
placeholder_fields.notes: Captures the provider-issued test pack reference; not the raw spreadsheet itself.

placeholder_fields.label: IM1 pairing reference
placeholder_fields.notes: Only complete when the IM1-enabled flag, SCAL, and approved third-party posture all exist.

placeholder_fields.label: Allow real provider mutation
placeholder_fields.notes: Must remain false by default and requires a pause-before-submit acknowledgement.

vault_ingest_flow.action: Promote live secret material into preprod_vault or production_vault only after dual review
Reference signing material by HSM key ID only; never expose private-key bytes to browser automation
